verses.text: Tua ciangin ciangkhut tawh a kibang tehna ding ciang khat kei kiangah hong kipia a, “Pai in la, Pasian' biakinn leh biakna tau leh tua lai-ah Pasian a bia mite va teh in
Ahi zongin biakinn pualam tualte teh kei in. Minam dangte' khutsungah kipia khin a, amaute in kha sawmlilenih sung Khuapi Siangtho tuancilgawp ding uh ahih manin tua a tualte tehloin nusia lel in
Ka teci nihte puanhampi silhin ka paisak ding a, amaute in ni tul khat za nih sawmguk sung Pasian' thu a gen ding uh hi,” hong ci hi
Tua teci nihte pen leitung Topa mai-ah a om oliv kung nihte leh meivakna nihte ahi uh hi
Mi khatpeuh in amaute suksiat ding hanciam leh amaute' kam panin meikuang pusuakin a galte a kangtum hi. Amaute suksiat ding a hanciam peuhpeuh tua bangin kisusia hi
Amaute' ut hunhunin a thugen laitakun guah zulosak thei uh a, tuite sisan a suahsak theihna dingun vangliatna nei uh a, leitungah gimna a tuamtuam tungsak thei uh hi
Amaute in Pasian' thu genin a teci pan'na a zawhkhit uh ciangin kuahawm thukpi sung panin a hong paikhia ganhing in tua teci pangte simin zogawpin that ding a
singlamteh tungah amaute' Topa a kithahna mun Sodom ahih kei leh Egypt minkhem a pua khuapi kongzingah a luanghawm uh kipaidak ding hi
Mi namkim, pau namkim a zang mi tuamtuamte in ni thum leh ni lang sung amaute' luanghawm en ding uh a, a luanghawmte a kivui ding phallo ding uh hi

Teci a pang tua kamsang nihte in leitung mite tungah gimna nakpi takin tungsak uh ahih manin hih mi nihte a sihna hangin lungdamin pawi bawl ding uh a, a nuamna uh hangin khatlekhat letsong kipia ding uh hi
Ahi zongin ni thum leh ni lang a cin'khit ciangin amaute sungah Pasian kiang panin nuntakna hu lutin, amaute a khe-un hong ding uh ahih manin a mute khempeuh nakpi takin lau mahmah uh hi
Tua ciangin tua teci pang nihte in, “Hih lai-ah hong pai un,” ci-in vantung panin a kisapna awging a za uh hi. Tua ahih manin a galte uh' muhin vantung meiipi sungah paito uh hi

Tua hun laitakin nakpi takin zin ling a, a khuapi sehsawmsuah sehkhat tangding kisiacip a, tua zinling in mi tul sagih a sisak hi. A silo a hing laite lau mahmah uh a, vantung Pasian a liatna thu a phat uh hi
Gimna nihna a bei hita a, ahi zongin gimna a thumna hong tung baih ta ding hi.

Tua ciangin a sagihna vantung mi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantungah nakpi takin aw hong ging a, “Leitung ukna ding aana neihna pen i Topa Khrih-a' hong suakkhin a, amah in a tawntungin uk paisuak ding hi,” hong ci hi
Pasian mai-a a tokhom ciat uhah a tu upa sawmnihlelite zong mai pukin Pasian bia uh a
“A beisa hun leh tu hunah a om tawntung a Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, tu-in na vangliatna zangin ukding hong kipan khin na hih manin nangma tungah ka nuamna uh ka hong ko uh hi

Na hehna hong kilat hun hong tungta a, misite thukhenna ding hun hong tungta ahih manin minam dangte heh mahmah uh hi. Nangma nasem kamsangte, a lian a neu, nang hong kihta mi khempeuhte thaman na piak ding hun hi ta a, leitung a susia mite na suksiat ding hun hi ta hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin vantungah a om Pasian biakna innpi kihong a, a Thuciamna Singkuang zong biakinn sungah a om a kimu hi. Tua ciangin nakpi takin khua phia-in a ging lianpi om a, van gingin zin ling a, gialpi a kia hi.
